violations.message: Error types are appropriate (not generic Error for everything): The code uses generic Error for all thrown errors, rather than more specific error types (e.g., FileNotFoundError, ValidationError).
violations.details: Error handling is robust and descriptive, but only generic Error is used for all error cases.
